title: Project
description: A specific build under ~/claude/<project>/. Renders as a project page on the consumer site.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier; matches the directory name under ~/claude/ when applicable.

one_liner.description: Plain-English description for the projects index card.

visibility.description: Portfolio rendering ceiling: how much information about this project the portfolio is permitted to show. 'public' = full lens stack. 'mentioned' = title + one_liner + audience + ai_role + lessons only, no architecture/infra/repo links. 'hidden' = skipped. NOTE: this does NOT describe whether the project's running deployment is publicly accessible. For deployment access state, encode it in the link label (e.g. 'Live dashboard (login required)').

role.description: How central is AI to the project? core / helper / none.

agentic.description: Does this project use agentic AI (multi-step autonomous reasoning, tool use, agent loops, multi-agent flows)? 'partial' = bounded agentic patterns inside a mostly-single-call system. A pipeline of bounded prompts is NOT agentic.

tech_category.description: Categorical only (e.g. 'chat platform', 'data pipeline'). Forbidden for visibility=mentioned to leak tool names here.

screenshot.description: Path relative to repo root or full URL.

corpus_path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the project's source dir (e.g. '~/claude/erp-mapper'). Aggregator scans this for richer content.

last_updated.description: Derived from git log; do not hand-fill.
